ShortDescription.Value: Change blue outlines to Any color or transparency. Surface layers on/off, District colors.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Mochi's Hover Colors
### Reduce blue - **1-Click disable**/enable all blue outlines on the fly - in the city UI. - or change highlight transparency (alpha) and color. - Full highlight control: buildings, cars, trees, citizens, more!
#### Things to make life easier - **Guidelines** change color+ opacity so you see more than just white line with blue! - **Surfaces** turn off preview layers while using the Surface tool so you can see the real ground colors without cloudy layers on top. Hotkeys for easy workflow. - **Specialized Industry** button does the same for farms/excavators. - **District tool** change the color + opacity of district borders and overlays, or turn them off completely. - These extras don't cost more to have per performance; can reset the extra colors to game default if you like.
## Important - Lightweight - no Harmony patches - all vanilla; means safer, more compatible with other mods and the game, designed for optimal gameplay. - Bulldozer and Road-tool color behavior: check Options menu! - Turn off mod tooltips - click the Info button, top-left, in-city panel. - Darker panel option. Good for LegacyUI or players who prefer darker contrast. Try both standard and dark to see what you like! - Alpha = transparency; use the last bar on the color picker. - Tap preset 1 or 2 to switch your saved colors. - Change presets: select a color swatch box 1/row1, then hold preset 1 or 2 until the fill bar sweeps across - done. Reset button flips between your saved color or mod default. - Read the tooltips or Options Menu 3rd panel if you get lost. - Save-game safe and safe to remove any time. - Works with *Recolor* - HC does highlights, guidelines, overlays; not object color like yen's Recolor mod. Even HC's Color Picker is a vanilla component. - Performance Optimized: when the panel is closed, it is not doing active layout work; the C# systems mostly sit idle, example, you change a color, mod takes action, then goes back idle.
### Feedback - Please send suggestions, bug reports, or just say hi! - This took many months to overcome many obstacles in game code. - Please share and Like ! -- River Mochi
## ❤️ Special Thanks - **Huge shout out to everyone who tested or supported the mod on its 7 month journey to release.** - Flashbond - collab, tech feedback, testing - yenyang - collab, tech feedback, testing - StarQ - tech feedback, testing - gagaxm - feature idea, testing - Dx, Necko1996, BugsyG, ElGendo87, Maestro - testing - =Noel= Thumbnail, testing - rzzirrah - images1 consultant
### 12+ Languages - English, Français, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Polski, 简体中文 , 한국어 - Português Brasil, 繁體中文 , 日本語, Thai ภาษาไทย, Tiếng Việt, Turkish Türkçe, EU Portuguese Português
tags: Mochi's blue scrubber, Highlight, border color, remove blue, guidelines, district colors, surface tool, custom colors, transparency.
Publish.ChangeLog: - Resize main color outline swatch, add styling and dot indicator - Added Collapsible panel arrow - Mod Tooltips now can only be turned off from Options menu to prevent player accidental turn off - info icon can only turn on tooltip but not off.
